name: Armor of the Acari
setBonus: Acari: Every enemy damaged by Heatwave grants 25% Anomaly Power bonus for 10 seconds.

name: Armor of the Reforged
setBonus: Reforged: Using Thermal Bomb increases the next damage of Feed the Flames by 200%. Using Feed the Flames increases damage of next Thermal Bomb by 200%.

name: Heat Seeker's Boots
setBonus: Heat Seeker: After successful detonation, Thermal Bomb travels to the target with the lowest health in a 25 meter radius. Thermal Bomb applied this way deals 50% less damage and can chain up to 3 times.

name: Scorched Zealot's Crown
setBonus: Scorched Zealot: The Pyromancer Melee skill fires a projectile that explodes upon impact, dealing X damage and inflicting Ash to enemies within a 5 meter radius. Damage of the projectile increases by 25% for each enemy hit with Feed the Flames, up to 100%. Bonus is spent on the next Melee skill use.
